SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jul-07-2011 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:58AM

Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, clerk - Annie Pascual, nothing on record, dept. 414
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Thachphan Charoonsophonsak appears with counsel, William M. Ziering, sbn 33215. Respondent, Lev Shevkhod in pro per. Parties previously sworn, and testify in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles. Witness, testifies on behalf of Respondent.

10:32AM
Exhibits retained. Case submitted.
